tripOverview.intro: London beckons with its perfect blend of historic grandeur and modern vibrancy, offering countless romantic moments from Thames sunset walks to cozy pub evenings. This iconic city embraces all travelers with open arms, featuring world-class museums, diverse neighborhoods, and an incredible food scene that will delight your vegetarian palates.
tripOverview.vibe: London will sweep you off your feet with its romantic riverside walks, diverse culinary scene, and welcoming LGBTQ+ community across charming neighborhoods.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April is perfect for London with mild spring weather, blooming flowers, and fewer crowds than summer months.

attractions.name: Tower Bridge
attractions.desc: London's iconic Victorian bridge with stunning Thames views and glass floor walkways.

attractions.name: British Museum
attractions.desc: World-renowned museum housing incredible artifacts from ancient civilizations.

attractions.name: Big Ben & Westminster
attractions.desc: London's famous clock tower and the heart of British political life.

attractions.name: Buckingham Palace
attractions.desc: The Queen's official residence with the famous Changing of the Guard ceremony.

attractions.name: London Eye
attractions.desc: Giant observation wheel offering panoramic views across the entire city.

attractions.name: Covent Garden
attractions.desc: Historic market area filled with street performers, shops, and restaurants.

destinationOverview.transportation: London's extensive public transport system includes the Underground (Tube), buses, and river services, with an Oyster Card or contactless payment being your best bet for seamless travel. Black cabs are iconic but pricey, while rideshare apps like Uber operate throughout the city. Walking is often the quickest way for short distances, especially in Central London where attractions are closely clustered.
destinationOverview.tip: Download the Citymapper app for real-time transport updates and always stand right on escalators - Londoners take this seriously!
destinationOverview.safety: London is very safe for LGBTQ+ travelers with a welcoming atmosphere, especially in areas like Soho, Shoreditch, and South London.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with an eSIM for instant access to maps, translation apps, and sharing your London adventures in real-time.

days.intro: Begin your London adventure exploring the historic core where royalty and politics shaped the nation.

morning.name: Arrive & Check-in
morning.desc: Get settled at your hotel and grab a welcome coffee.

morning.name: Westminster Walk
morning.desc: Stroll past Big Ben, Parliament, and Westminster Bridge.

afternoon.name: Westminster Abbey
afternoon.desc: Explore the stunning gothic abbey where royals are crowned and wed.

afternoon.name: St. James's Park
afternoon.desc: Romantic walk through London's oldest royal park.

evening.name: Traditional Pub
evening.desc: Experience authentic British pub culture with vegetarian options.

evening.name: Thames Evening Walk
evening.desc: Romantic riverside stroll with illuminated landmarks.

days.tip: Book Westminster Abbey tickets online to skip queues and consider the audio guide for fascinating royal history.

days.intro: Dive deep into royal history with palaces, towers, and the Crown Jewels.

morning.name: Tower of London
morning.desc: Discover the Crown Jewels and 1000 years of royal history.

morning.name: Tower Bridge
morning.desc: Walk across the glass floor and enjoy panoramic city views.

afternoon.name: Borough Market
afternoon.desc: Your must-see foodie paradise with incredible vegetarian options.

afternoon.name: Southbank Walk
afternoon.desc: Scenic Thames-side walk to Shakespeare's Globe area.

evening.name: Indian Dinner
evening.desc: Authentic Indian cuisine in Brick Lane's curry houses.

evening.name: Shoreditch Bars
evening.desc: Explore trendy LGBTQ+-friendly bars in East London.

days.tip: Borough Market is busiest on Saturdays - arrive early for the best selection and shorter queues.

days.intro: Immerse yourself in London's vibrant market culture and diverse neighborhoods.

morning.name: Camden Market
morning.desc: Browse unique crafts, vintage finds, and street food stalls.

morning.name: Regent's Canal Walk
morning.desc: Peaceful towpath walk from Camden to Little Venice.

afternoon.name: Little Venice
afternoon.desc: Romantic canal-side area with charming narrowboats.

afternoon.name: Portobello Road
afternoon.desc: Famous antique market in colorful Notting Hill.

evening.name: Notting Hill Exploration
evening.desc: Stroll through the movie-famous neighborhood's pretty streets.

evening.name: Vegetarian Fine Dining
evening.desc: Upscale plant-based cuisine for a romantic evening.

days.tip: Portobello Market is liveliest on Saturdays, but weekdays offer a more relaxed browsing experience.

days.intro: Experience London from above and along its famous river Thames.

morning.name: South Bank Walk
morning.desc: Stroll along the Thames with street performers and book markets.

afternoon.name: Tate Modern
afternoon.desc: World-class contemporary art in a stunning former power station.

afternoon.name: Thames River Cruise
afternoon.desc: Scenic boat ride from Westminster to Greenwich.

evening.name: Greenwich Royal Observatory
evening.desc: Stand on the Prime Meridian and enjoy sunset city views.

evening.name: Greenwich Pub
evening.desc: Historic riverside pub with vegetarian British fare.

days.tip: Book London Eye tickets online and choose sunset slots for the most romantic experience with your partner.

days.intro: Discover world-class museums and enjoy London's beautiful green spaces.

morning.name: British Museum
morning.desc: Explore ancient treasures including the Rosetta Stone and Egyptian mummies.

morning.name: Russell Square
morning.desc: Peaceful garden square perfect for a romantic break.

afternoon.name: Covent Garden
afternoon.desc: Historic market with street performers, shops, and cafes.

afternoon.name: National Gallery
afternoon.desc: Masterpieces by Van Gogh, Monet, and Da Vinci in Trafalgar Square.

evening.name: Soho Exploration
evening.desc: Wander through London's vibrant LGBTQ+ heart with rainbow crossings.

evening.name: Chinatown Vegetarian
evening.desc: Excellent Buddhist vegetarian cuisine just steps from Soho.

days.tip: Most major museums offer free admission but consider donating and booking timed slots during busy periods.

days.intro: Explore London's diverse neighborhoods each with their own unique character and charm.

morning.name: Hyde Park
morning.desc: Stroll through London's largest park and visit Speaker's Corner.

morning.name: Kensington Palace
morning.desc: Princess Diana's former home with royal exhibitions and gardens.

afternoon.name: South Kensington Museums
afternoon.desc: Choose between V&A, Natural History, or Science Museum.

afternoon.name: Chelsea Walking
afternoon.desc: Upscale neighborhood with elegant streets and boutique shopping.

evening.name: King's Road Shopping
evening.desc: Browse unique shops and cafes along this famous street.

evening.name: Chelsea Dinner
evening.desc: Sophisticated vegetarian dining in elegant surroundings.

days.tip: The V&A Museum has excellent vegetarian dining options and stays open late on Fridays for a more romantic visit.

days.intro: Experience London's legendary theater district and vibrant nightlife scene.

morning.name: Leicester Square
morning.desc: Heart of London's entertainment district with street performers.

morning.name: Seven Dials Shopping
morning.desc: Unique seven-street junction with independent boutiques.

afternoon.name: Fortnum & Mason
afternoon.desc: Luxury department store famous for afternoon tea and gourmet foods.

afternoon.name: Piccadilly Circus
afternoon.desc: London's Times Square with bright lights and buzzing energy.

evening.name: Pre-Theater Dinner
evening.desc: Early vegetarian dinner before your West End show.

evening.name: West End Musical
evening.desc: World-class theater production in London's famous theater district.

days.tip: Book theater tickets in advance online or try the TKTS booth in Leicester Square for same-day discounts.

days.intro: Your final morning to soak in London's atmosphere before departure.

morning.name: Breakfast & Coffee
morning.desc: Leisurely breakfast at a favorite London cafe you've discovered.

morning.name: Last-minute Shopping
morning.desc: Pick up souvenirs and British treats to take home.

afternoon.name: Hotel Checkout
afternoon.desc: Collect luggage and prepare for airport transfer.

afternoon.name: Heathrow Express
afternoon.desc: Fast train connection to airport for your flight home.

evening.name: Departure
evening.desc: Flight back to Philadelphia with wonderful London memories.

days.tip: Allow 3 hours for international flights and consider Heathrow Express for reliable airport timing.

food.intro: London's food scene is incredibly diverse with excellent vegetarian options, from traditional British fare to world-class Indian cuisine.
food.tip: Most pubs serve food until 9 PM, and tipping 10-15% is standard in restaurants but not required in pubs when ordering at the bar.

neighborhoods.name: Covent Garden
neighborhoods.desc: Central location near theaters, restaurants, and major attractions
neighborhoods.whyStay: Walking distance to everything with romantic cobblestone streets

neighborhoods.name: South Kensington
neighborhoods.desc: Museum district with elegant Victorian architecture and upscale dining
neighborhoods.whyStay: World-class museums and beautiful garden squares nearby

neighborhoods.name: Shoreditch
neighborhoods.desc: Trendy East London area with vibrant LGBTQ+ scene and street art
neighborhoods.whyStay: Hip neighborhood with excellent nightlife and diverse food scene

budget.name: Premier Inn London
budget.vibe: Modern chain hotel with comfortable rooms

budget.name: YHA London Central
budget.vibe: Clean hostel with private rooms available

midRange.name: Z Hotel Piccadilly
midRange.vibe: Compact modern rooms in prime location
